feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,920Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 23

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: you were always a winner (the one i knew best)
entry.summary:
Author: lazarustears (ryyss)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: "Here to finish me off?" Jason taunted, his voice gravelly and hoarse, not quite what it should be yet. "Is this where you're holed up in?" Jason had been expecting Bruce again. He had almost expected Batman to crash into his dingy, shitty safe house, forcing his hand to fight lest he be placed into a place like Arkham, as though criminals didn't regularly break out anyway, oh, God forbid, whatever could he possibly do, he's so scared— He was not, on the other hand, was not expecting Nightwing. "Ha, you're not dead after all," Jason said.or: nightwing pays a visit to red hood. —for day 4 of ggh jdweek 2026:face fucking & "open up for me, goldie."

entry.title: bottoms up (let's forget tonight)
entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,950Chapters: 12/14Kudos: 580

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: blood is thicker than water
entry.summary:
Author: nux_myristica

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,314Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Jason had no problem covering for Dick on this one. It happens. Death happens. And this one was most certainly an accident, and even if it wasn’t, the fucker deserved to die. But then it happens again. And again. And again. And it’s not so easy to cover Dick’s bloodied hands, though Dick sure as hell convinces Jason to try.

entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,465Chapters: 14/25Kudos: 106

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. entry.title: Scary Monsters (And Super Creeps)
entry.summary:
Author: mermaidautopsy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,029Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: 'I'm not sure which I should preform first; an exorcism, or pest removal' John grumbled to no one but himself, flicking his lighter back to life and kissing it to the end of his last, crumpled cigarette. Chas, characterisically unimpressed with the warlock's lax attitude towards the case, grumbled something no doubt vulgarly worded to himself out of John's earshot in return. A third voice; calm, collected, and to John's ears, far too distinctly Gothamite for his liking, entered the conversation without waiting to ask either of the gentlemen for permission. 'If you let me take out the vermin, there won't be any need for your cheap magic tricks' the Red Hood spoke through his visor, exiting the shadows that pervaded the entrenched canal walkway, stalking towards the two men where they stood, hands shoved in their pockets, bickering under a half-dead streetlamp at the water's edge. 'Well our kid, Chas and I, we can't take you up on that most generous offer of yours. See, we've already come so far out here as to freeze our arses off, might as well let us finish the job' John shot back, puffing up smoke and steam alike as he offered the young vigilante a pointed glare 'In summery; fuck off'.

entry.title: I hugged you tight as you were crumpling down, as I have found your loneliness
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,175Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: He has nothing: no family, no friends, no wealth, and no reputation. His so-called 'life' before the shooting is just full of selfish people who just want to take and take until he is stretched thin to the point of no return. What sort of life is that? But is the alternative right now any better? Being a slut for a man who sees him as nothing more than a hole to stuff his sperm into? Apparently it is, because Ric is still here, letting the bastard do whatever the fuck he wants.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,547Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.   (Guys I'm a child and I'm broke, I can't pay for comics or art. If you want to gift art, I'd be very happy to take it, and I also do art trades, but I cannot pay for services. Thank you.)

entry.title: All the stars are closer
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,686Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: This behaviour showed up more than once; apparently, Jason stumbled upon something he later discovered was called 'subspace'. It had been Kori who told him that, explaining that Dick tended to slip into subspace when he felt safe and when the person beside him had full control of the situation.Jason wasn't an expert in the subject, mostly because he never really had anyone to try this stuff with; he didn't really need it. Or that was what he had thought some moments ago. Now, he had apparently become the caretaker of someone who used subspace as a way of… Coping.
